commands.review_summary:
The branch hard-deletes account-owned and publisher-owned resources during account/org deletion, adds a deleted-account recovery purge path, updates deletion confirmation UI, and adds unit plus local-auth Playwright coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the PR head shows hard deletion of package moderation rows and unbounded child-row collection, while current specs require soft-delete retention. I did not run a live high-volume failure path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs maintainer security/product policy before an automated repair lane can safely decide which deletion evidence to preserve or purge.

target.title: feat: hard delete account-owned resources
target.body:
## Summary

- hard-delete personal account and publisher-owned resources during account deletion, including skills, plugins, auth bindings, API tokens, and related package rows
- extend org deletion cleanup to remove publisher-adjacent rows and keep deletion confirmations explicit about permanent removal
- add a deleted-account recovery backfill path for eligible self-deleted accounts so the same GitHub identity can sign up again
- update account/org deletion modals to list each affected skill/plugin as a row before the irreversible action

Fixes #2333

## Verification

- `bunx convex codegen`
- `bun run test -- src/components/DevPersonaFab.test.tsx src/lib/useAuthStatus.test.tsx convex/users.test.ts convex/publishers.test.ts src/routes/-settings.test.tsx`
- `bun run test -- convex/publishers.test.ts src/routes/-settings.test.tsx`
- `PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=44173 PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL_AUTH_CONVEX_URL=http://127.0.0.1:33210 PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL_AUTH_CONVEX_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:33211 bun run test:pw:local-auth -- --project=chromium e2e/local-auth/delete-account-resources.pw.test.ts`
- `bun run format:check`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run lint`

## UI Proof

A ClawHub UI Proof comment with the account deletion confirmation screenshot will be published separately.
target.author: patrick-erichsen
